author: DominicVainMod
content:
STAR ATLAS DEVS VS. COMMUNITY KICKS OFF IN 15 MINUTES!,8 community teams are taking on the Star Atlas Devs and every victory means more rewards for you in the audience! Here’s what’s at stake:

 1 team wins: 500 Community Tickets for the audience
 2 teams win: 1,000 Community Tickets for the audience
 3 teams win: 2,000 Community Tickets for the audience
 4 teams win: 5,000 Community Tickets for the audience

The more they win, the more Community Tickets the audience earns. Remember, tickets can be submitted into the $15,000 Community Week Carnival on August 2!

 | Tune in and cheer them on here: ⁠🎤┃Atlas Amphitheater

@everyone
